torch_pattern: scores = scores * (1 / head_size**0.5)  # skipped if head_size is None (scaler=1.0)
scores = scores + attention_mask        # skipped if attention_mask is None

config_template.program_config: ttnn.SoftmaxShardedMultiCoreProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size={GRID}, subblock_w={SUBBLOCK_W}, block_h={HEADS_PER_CORE}*{SEQ_LEN}//32, block_w={SEQ_LEN}//32)  # optional; omit for interleaved/auto

applicability_notes: In-place fused scale+mask+softmax over last dim of attention scores [B, H, S_q, S_k]. Replaces the 3-op chain mul(1/sqrt(head_size)) -> add(mask) -> softmax(-1). In-place: output inherits input memory_config. Model code falls back to unfused path when compute dtype is float32 or last dim >= 4096.; torch_pattern_source: golden

placement_observations.source: call_site (dynamic_softmax_config / softmax_program_config call sites; sharded softmax program config with block dims derived from seq_len tiles)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: last dim (key seq_len) regime gate for fused path
placement_observations.source: call_site (`if compute_dtype == ttnn.float32 or attn_scores.shape[-1] >= 4096: use_fused_softmax = False`); fused attention_softmax_ used only when last dim < 4096 and dtype != float32

placement_observations.tensor_role: output (attention_probabilities, consumed by ttnn.matmul with value)
placement_observations.source: call_site (context_layer = ttnn.matmul(attention_probabilities, value_layer, memory_config=ttnn.L1_HEIGHT_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG)); in-place op keeps probs resident in L1 for the value matmul
call_site (no program_config passed; downstream matmul uses ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b, core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y=batch_size, x=num_cores_x))
